text:
FAC_TYPE CCN Facility Type Code indicating the type of facility represented by the CCN. For CCNs obtained from the participant list, facility type is self-reported. For CCNs obtained from PECOS, facility type is obtained from PECOS and assigned a valid Fac_Type value. Values:
F = Federally Qualified Health Center
R = Rural Health Center
C = Critical Access Hospital Method II 
T = Elective Teaching Amendment Hospital
X = Other Facility Type CHAR 1
FAC_DESC FAC_DESC CCN Facility Type
